overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of an armored character exploring a dimly lit industrial tavern with exposed brick walls and metal walkways. The character descends from an upper observation level to the main floor where NPCs gather around wooden tables and a service counter.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper metal walkway overlooking tavern floor

events.description: character turns and begins descending the metal staircase to the main floor

agents.ego_description: walking along the upper walkway and descending the metal stairs toward the main tavern floor

entered.detail: black metal safety railing along the upper observation walkway
exposed red brick wall with rough industrial texture
wall-mounted lantern casting warm orange ambient light
wooden tables and chairs arranged on the lower level below the walkway
metal grate stairs connecting the upper walkway to the main floor

segments.scene_description: The segment begins on an upper metal walkway overlooking a dimly lit tavern interior. The character moves along the railing past exposed brick walls and industrial lighting fixtures before turning to descend a metal staircase toward the main floor below.

scene_state.functional_zone: tavern main floor with seating and service counter

events.description: character approaches NPCs gathered at the wooden service counter

agents.ego_description: walking across the wooden floor toward the back counter where NPCs are standing

notable_agents.action: two NPCs standing at the wooden counter, facing the wall

entered.detail: wooden plank flooring covering the main tavern level
tall industrial metal shelves holding various items and containers
long wooden service counter running along the left wall
heavy wooden door with metal reinforcement at the back of the room
framed poster or notice pinned to the brick wall above the counter

segments.scene_description: Having reached the main floor, the character walks across the wooden planks past metal shelving units toward a wooden service counter where NPCs are gathered. The warm industrial lighting illuminates the brick walls and heavy wooden door at the back of the tavern.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an elevated industrial vantage point down into the heart of a dimly lit tavern. It begins on an upper metal walkway, gliding past exposed brick walls and industrial lighting fixtures before turning to descend a metal staircase. As the character reaches the main floor, the perspective shifts from the overhead railing to a ground-level view of wooden planks and metal shelving units. The scene then opens up as the camera moves toward a wooden service counter where NPCs are gathered, with the warm industrial glow illuminating the surrounding brickwork and a heavy wooden door at the back of the room.
